title: launchCaseCollectionRequest
description: Schema for launchCaseCollectionRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

caseId.description: id of the case within which to start a collection

configurationId.description: id of the collection configuration to use for collection criteria

location.description: destination of the collection (if blank then destination determined by the specified collection configuration)

custodianIds.description: id(s) of the custodian(s) for which to launch this collection
